title: Anthropic Evangelism Wiki
note: First property of The Hyperagentic Age: the illustrated visual layer for anthropicevangelism.wiki (Gary's field-sourced strategy for how Anthropic wins the startup ecosystem while being net-positive for humanity). Spine = thesis (it argues a position, not a hero-journey). Features the Chief of Agents, Maya, and the crossing. Registered as a stub: heroes/beats not yet migrated. The render pipeline lives in the wiki repo (illustrations/SPEC.md); this universe is the medium-neutral canon behind the wiki, future explainers, and decks.
